title: About us
body: "What we do  The Health Equity in Health Protection Initiative supports UKHSA’s cross-cutting goal to deliver more equitable health outcomes. The initiative does this by helping UKHSA to build a strong foundation of data and evidence relevant to health equity in health protection. This includes understanding:   the differential impact of health protection hazards on CORE20PLUS and inclusion health groups what interventions are most effective in reducing health inequalities in health protection how communities experience and engage with health services   "
